channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: League of Legends Game Changers Rising New 2026 Format Announced
item.content:encoded:
Riot Games has outlined the return of League of Legends Game Changers Rising, with the 2026 edition featuring a vastly expanded format, which will see more games and more competition.

The inaugural League of Legends Game Changers Rising saw Eterna qualify from the Open Qualifiers, before completing an undefeated Group Stage, defeating G2 Hel twice in the Playoffs to claim the LoL Game Changers Rising 2025 crown.

LoL Game Changers Rising returns with new format

League of Legends Game Changers Rising, which Riot describes as “the official EMEA League of Legends competition for anyone identifying as women,” was confirmed to return in March, however, the format of the competition was not known at the time.

In March, the IP was confirmed to be in the hands of N.E.O (New Esports Org), a French Tournament Organizer which managers EMEA Masters, Evo France, EVA Pro League, and holds the French broadcast rights to the Esports Nations Cup.

Under the new partnership, Game Changers will feature competition from May to October, with the first ‘Kick off’ stage running from May 29 to May 31.

The format will see similar three-day stages running each month from May to September, before culminating in the October playoffs.

High placings in the stages will earn points, which will determine the six teams that will earn their spot at the October playoffs.

With up to 32 teams in each of the stages, the competition is set to have more representation, more depth, and more competition throughout as teams fight for those playoff spots.

In the playoffs, the six qualified teams will be joined by the winners of the German female competition, Equal Esports Cup, and the French Nova Series, integrating the competition into existing female esports competitions.

Riot stated their intent with the competition as part of the announcement, stating, “Building an inclusive and supportive environment for all players is fundamental to what we do.

“The continuation and evolution of the League of Legends Game Changers goes beyond competition: it’s about actively creating the conditions for women across EMEA to step forward, compete at the highest level, and be seen and recognized for their talent and achievements.

“Our leagues are open by design, and our ambition is clear: ensure that when the next generation of top players rises, they are not only welcomed, but fully valued as part of the competitive landscape.”

The participating teams will be announced in due course, with G2 Hel being chief amongst the names expected to play in the competition. Stay tuned for more news!

You can discuss all things League of Legends on our Discord!
For more news, see the full list of streamers who will take part in Jnyxzi’s LoL tournament.

Darragh is an Esports Journalist for Insider Gaming specialising in Counter-Strike. He loves to explore how esports teams work, or why they very often do not.

More from Darragh Harbinson

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: LEGO Batman: Legacy Of The Dark Knight Release Date & All Platforms, Explained
item.content:encoded:
Batman has been a staple for LEGO video games since the PS2 era, with the original being a beloved classic to many. Now, almost 20 years after the first LEGO Batman was released, it’s time for LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight.

Get ready for an all-encompassing adventure that explores and combines the rich history of the Dark Knight. With its own unique story that pulls elements from every Batman avenue, be it comics, films or games, it’s looking like LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight will be a must-play for any Batman fan out there.

If that’s you, then you’ll want to know when the game is set to release, as well as which platforms it’ll be playable on; luckily for you, we’ve got all the information you’ll need.

When Does LEGO Batman: Legacy Of The Dark Knight Come Out? Release Date, Explained

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is set to launch on May 22, 2026.

LEGO games have never really had a reliable release window, with past titles launched throughout the year. That being said, TT Games’ last venture with LEGO Star Wars: The Skywalker Saga was released in April, so the springtime release could become consistent.

  • More Insider Gaming: LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Updated PC System Requirements Revealed

Regardless, that means it’s almost time to don the cowl and take to the streets of Gotham. With six chapters of missions and an open world to explore, there should be plenty to keep you occupied, but what time does the game launch?

LEGO Batman: Legacy Of The Dark Knight Exact Start Times

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight will officially launch at 10 AM PT on May 22, 2026.

If you’re on the West Coast, that gives you practically all day to play as the Caped Crusader, though it’s a different story for those of you across the world. Here’s a handy time zone converter to help you figure out when you can jump into LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight for the first time:

Can You Play LEGO Batman: Legacy Of The Dark Knight On PlayStation? PS5 Status, Explained

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight will be a day-one release on the PlayStation 5, though it won’t be available on past-gen platforms.

  • More Insider Gaming: Sony PlayStation Lawsuit Refund: How To Check Eligibility and Claim Your Money

This marks LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight as the first mainline LEGO game to be exclusive to current-gen platforms, with the Skywalker Saga being available on the PS4. And given the nature and history of LEGO games, it was always going to appear on the PS5.

Can You Play LEGO Batman: Legacy Of The Dark Knight On Xbox? Xbox Series X|S Status, Explained

The same can be said for the Xbox, as LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight will also launch day one on Xbox Series X|S.

And just like the PlayStation version, it won’t be playable on past iterations of the Xbox. In fairness to TT Games, it’s about time we move away from past-gen consoles, and it looks like LEGO Batman is taking that leap.

Can You Play LEGO Batman: Legacy Of The Dark Knight On PC?

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight is also coming to PC, meaning it’s not a console exclusive.

With GTA 6 buckling down on a console-first release plan, some LEGO Batman fans might have worried that TT Games might take a similar approach. But fear not, as that’s not the case, and it will be purchasable on both Steam and the Epic Games Store.

Can You Play LEGO Batman: Legacy Of The Dark Knight On Nintendo Switch? Nintendo Switch 2 Status, Explained

LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight will be coming to the Nintendo Switch 2, but not alongside other platforms.

Nintendo fans, you’ll have to wait a bit longer, as there is currently no launch date for the Nintendo Switch 2 version. It’s still slated for a 2026 release, but as things stand, it’s unclear when it could be.

  • More Insider Gaming: May 2026 Video Game Releases: Full Schedule and Biggest Games

It’s not the only game to struggle with a Switch 2 port, as 007 First Light has also had its Switch 2 version delayed to late Summer. Given that both games release around the same time, could LEGO Batman: Legacy of the Dark Knight launch on the Switch 2 in late Summer as well? It’s all speculation for now, but hang in there, Switch fans—it’s definitely on the way.

Are you excited to finally play LEGO Batman: Legacy Of The Dark Knight? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Insider Gaming guides, check out the following:

  • Invincible VS Complete Character Tier List—Best Invincible VS Characters, Ranked
  • All Free Characters in Neverness to Everness & How to Get Them

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For May 7, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, May 7, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Time
  • Hint 2: Period
  • Hint 3: Used in history

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Modern
  • Sixty
  • Past
  • Early
  • Heyday
  • History
  • Century
  • Decade
  • Bygone

Today’s Contexto Answer For May 7, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Era

An Era is a period of time during which particular events or stages of development are typical.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on May 8.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Snoop Dogg Joins Stranger Than Heaven Cast as Details Drop
item.content:encoded:
On May 6, 2026, Xbox presented a brand new look at Stranger Than Heaven, the newest IP from Ryu Ga Gotoku Studios. Several new details were shared, including the game’s musical theme and the fact that Snoop Dogg voices one of the main characters.

The 30-minute broadcast shared several new plot details and revealed that Snoop Dogg and his son, Cordell Broadus, are among the star-studded cast. Other cast members include Tori Kelly and J-pop star Satoshi Fujihara. The game’s narrative spans 50 years, beginning in 1915, and focuses on the showmanship of the entertainment industry.

Snoop Dogg’s Role in the Game Revealed

In the game, Snoop Dogg portrays a character named Orpheus. The MTV Video Music Award winner describes the character as a “cutthroat and charismatic” smuggler. The role his son is playing is yet to be revealed.

As can maybe be expected with a game that has hired so many musical entertainers as part of its cast, showbiz is a major part of the game, too. The main character, Makoto Daito, is an American-born entertainer with an American father and a Japanese mother. Throughout the story, Makoto and his friend, Yu Shinjo, form a partnership with Orpheus, who eventually discovers the main character’s musical talents.

Makoto and Yu eventually become business partners, and one gameplay mechanic sees Makoto scouting for other talents with musical gifts. He can also collect sounds throughout the world that players can use to create original compositions.

“Collecting sounds and composing ties into Makoto’s wider calling as a showman, producing and managing gigs and performances for other artists. This is where Stranger Than Heaven incorporates management elements; Makoto will organize the structure of various shows, decide which musicians will take part in it, and choose a setlist. During the broadcast, we see an example of this where the player can arrange a five-piece band on a stage by choosing from a roster of performers,” the Xbox Wire post on the game notes.

Stranger Than Heaven’s Unique Combat

Stranger Than Heaven offers a unique combat system in which both sides of Makoto’s body can be controlled independently. Players have the ability to block incoming attacks with one arm while counterattacking with the other. Additionally, they can tackle an enemy by using the LT and RT buttons together.

Learn more about the game here.

Stranger Than Heaven arrives this winter. It will be available on day one via Xbox Game Pass. Insider Gaming will continue to monitor the story and report any updates as more information becomes available.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Mina the Hollower Releases Later This Month
item.content:encoded:
Mina the Hollower is coming out this month. Yacht Club Games announced the release date on social media.

It was only on April 25 that the studio announced a release date would be coming soon. Now, they’ve confirmed the game will release on Friday, May 29, 2026. Furthermore, it was confirmed that the game will cost only $19.99. It’s planned for release on Sony PlayStation 5, Xbox Series X|S, and Nintendo Switch 1 & 2.

Mina the Hollower Was Planed to be Released on Halloween 2025

Mina the Hollower is the follow-up from the creators of Shovel Knight. The game features a Game Boy Color-inspired art style and a soundtrack influenced by the MSX. It was originally set to release on Halloween 2025. Then, on October 6, 2025, the team announced a delay, promising to deliver their best work.

What began as a side project by Alec Faulkner was funded through a 2022 Kickstarter campaign. After more than six years in development, Yacht Club Games calls Mina their most ambitious project yet, featuring 25 bosses and mini-bosses. They also note that it’s their most expansive title to date.

Insider Gaming will continue to track updates leading up to the game’s release. For more on why Yacht Club Games believes this title could define their future, check out the full story at this link.

Are you excited for the release of Mina the Hollower? Sound off in our official Discord server. Also, don’t forget to sign up for our weekly newsletter.
